code:
%% Sequence Diagram: Play Command Flow %% Purpose: Shows the complete flow when a user executes /play command %% Author: Discord Bot Team %% Last Updated: 2025-11-03 sequenceDiagram autonumber actor User as 👤 Discord User participant Discord as Discord API participant Gateway as Gateway Service participant Redis as Redis Pub/Sub participant Audio as Audio Service participant DB as PostgreSQL participant Lavalink as Lavalink participant YouTube as YouTube API Note over User,YouTube: User wants to play a song in voice channel %% Command Initiation User->>Discord: /play query: "never gonna give you up" activate Discord Discord->>Gateway: INTERACTION_CREATE event activate Gateway Note over Gateway: Validate interaction
Check permissions Gateway->>Discord: POST /interactions/{Groupware_KanbanBoard}/callback
(Groupware_KanbanBoard) Discord->>User: Show processing message deactivate Discord %% Command Processing Gateway->>DB: SELECT * FROM guild_settings
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Gateway: Guild settings (Groupware_KanbanBoard) deactivate DB Gateway->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:commands
{Groupware_SprintBacklog} activate Redis Note over Redis: Message queued in pub/sub Redis->>Audio: Message delivered deactivate Redis activate Audio %% Audio Service Processing Note over Audio: Extract query and guild info Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Current queue (Groupware_ChatRoom) deactivate DB %% Search for Track alt Query is YouTube URL Note over Audio: Parse YouTube URL
Extract video ID else Query is search term Audio->>Lavalink: GET /loadtracks?identifier=ytsearch:{Groupware_ChatRoom} activate Lavalink Lavalink->>YouTube: Search API request activate YouTube YouTube-->>Lavalink: Search results deactivate YouTube Lavalink-->>Audio: Track results (Groupware_IssueTracker) deactivate Lavalink Note over Audio: Select first result end %% Cache Search Results Audio->>Redis: SETEX search:{Groupware_KanbanBoard} 300 {Groupware_IssueTracker} activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Add to Queue alt Queue is empty Note over Audio: This will be the first track Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(Groupware_SprintBacklog) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created (Groupware_WikiPage) deactivate DB %% Start Playback Audio->>Lavalink: POST /sessions/{Groupware_WikiPage}/players/{Groupware_KanbanBoard}
{Groupware_IssueTracker} } activate Lavalink Note over Lavalink: Create player
Connect to voice channel Lavalink->>Discord: Voice connection (Groupware_ChatRoom) activate Discord Discord-->>Lavalink: Voice connection established deactivate Discord Lavalink->>YouTube: Stream audio data activate YouTube Note over Lavalink: Download and encode audio YouTube-->>Lavalink: Audio stream deactivate YouTube Lavalink->>Discord: Send opus packets (Groupware_IssueTracker) activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Audio playback in voice channel deactivate Discord Lavalink-->>Audio: Player updated event deactivate Lavalink else Queue has tracks Note over Audio: Add to end of queue Audio->>DB: SELECT MAX(Groupware_KanbanBoard) FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: maxPosition deactivate DB Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(Groupware_ChatRoom) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created deactivate DB end %% Update Cache Audio->>Redis: SET queue:{Groupware_SprintBacklog} {Groupware_WikiPage}
EX 3600 activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Send UI Update alt First track (Groupware_KanbanBoard) Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{Groupware_KanbanBoard}, ... } activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: UI update message deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: POST /channels/{Groupware_SprintBacklog}/messages
{Groupware_SprintBacklog], components: [Groupware_IssueTracker] } activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Now Playing: Song Title
[Groupware_IssueTracker] deactivate Discord Gateway->>Discord: DELETE /webhooks/{Groupware_WikiPage}/messages/@original
(Groupware_KanbanBoard) activate Discord deactivate Discord else Added to queue Gateway->>Discord: POST /webhooks/{Groupware_ChatRoom}/messages/@original
{Groupware_SprintBacklog)", ephemeral: true } activate Discord Discord->>User: ✅ Added to queue (Groupware_KanbanBoard) deactivate Discord end deactivate Gateway deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: User hears music playing in voice channel %% Track Events loop Every 5 seconds Lavalink->>Audio: PlayerUpdate event
{Groupware_WikiPage} activate Audio Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:to-discord
{Groupware_SprintBacklog} activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Player update event deactivate Redis Note over Gateway: Update UI if needed
(Groupware_IssueTracker) deactivate Audio end %% Track End Note over Lavalink,Audio: Track finishes playing Lavalink->>Audio: TrackEnd event
{Groupware_IssueTracker} activate Audio Audio->>DB: DELETE FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Deleted deactivate DB Audio->>DB: UPDATE queue SET position = position - 1
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue reindexed deactivate DB alt More tracks in queue Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Next track deactivate DB Note over Audio: Play next track
(Groupware_ChatRoom) else Queue empty and autoplay enabled Note over Audio: Generate autoplay recommendation Audio->>Audio: Get similar tracks
based on last played Note over Audio: Add to queue and play else Queue empty and autoplay disabled Audio->>Lavalink: DELETE /sessions/{Groupware_KanbanBoard}/players/{Groupware_WikiPage} activate Lavalink Lavalink-->>Audio: Player destroyed deactivate Lavalink Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{Groupware_ChatRoom} activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Queue empty event deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: PATCH /channels/{Groupware_WikiPage}/messages/{Groupware_SprintBacklog}
{Groupware_WikiPage] } activate Discord Discord->>User: Queue finished (Groupware_KanbanBoard) deactivate Discord end deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: Flow complete

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为音频播放命令画一个完整的时序图，展示从用户输入/play到最终听到音乐的整个流程。核心参与者包括Discord用户、Discord API、Gateway服务、Redis Pub/Sub、Audio服务、PostgreSQL、Lavalink和YouTube API。
明白了。我注意到这里有三个数据存储层：PostgreSQL持久化存储、Redis缓存层、还有Lavalink作为音频处理中间件。用户命令是通过Gateway服务接收，然后转发给Audio服务处理对吗？
对的。Gateway主要负责接收Discord的INTERACTION_CREATE事件，做权限校验，然后立即给用户一个"处理中"的反馈。真正的音频逻辑在Audio服务里，它通过Redis Pub/Sub从Gateway解耦接收命令。
好的，我先画出基础骨架：用户发送/play "never gonna give you up"，Discord API把事件推给Gateway，Gateway回callback显示处理中，然后Gateway查PostgreSQL获取guild设置，再通过Redis Pub/Sub把命令发给Audio服务。
接下来是Audio服务的核心逻辑。它需要先查当前队列状态，然后处理搜索。这里有个分支：如果用户给的是YouTube直接链接，就解析video ID；如果是搜索词，就要走Lavalink去调YouTube API。
Lavalink在这里的角色是封装YouTube API调用吗？还是说它自己也做音频解码？
两者都有。Lavalink向上封装了YouTube、SoundCloud等平台的搜索和流获取，向下负责把音频转成opus包发给Discord。所以时序上Audio服务调Lavalink的/loadtracks接口，Lavalink内部再去调YouTube API，返回搜索结果给Audio服务。
我画出了alt分支：Query is YouTube URL 和 Query is search term。搜索分支里Audio调用Lavalink，Lavalink调用YouTube API，结果返回后Audio选第一个结果。另外我加了个Note说明Audio会缓存搜索结果到Redis，TTL 300秒。
缓存之后是关键的队列处理分支。如果队列为空，这是第一首歌，需要创建Lavalink player并建立语音连接；如果队列已有歌曲，就追加到末尾。这个分支会影响后续的UI反馈逻辑。
画好了。队列为空时：Audio插入队列记录，然后POST到Lavalink创建player，Lavalink和Discord建立语音连接，接着Lavalink从YouTube拉流、编码、发opus包给用户，同时返回player更新事件给Audio。
这里有个细节：Lavalink和Discord的语音连接建立后，Lavalink会主动持续从YouTube拉流，不需要Audio服务干预。Audio服务只负责控制指令，比如播放、暂停、切歌。
理解了，Lavalink是独立的音频引擎。那队列非空的情况我画成：Audio查当前最大position，然后INSERT新记录到队尾，不触发播放。对吗？
正确。两种情况最后都要更新Redis缓存队列状态，TTL 1小时。然后进入UI反馈阶段：如果是第一首歌，要发"Now Playing"卡片并删除原来的处理中消息；如果是追加队列，就修改原消息显示"已加入队列"。
UI反馈部分画好了。我注意到这里Gateway又参与了：Audio通过Redis Pub/Sub通知Gateway，Gateway再调Discord API发消息。这是因为Gateway持有Discord的webhook token，Audio服务没有直接权限。
很好，权限分离考虑到了。现在需要补充播放中的状态同步和结束处理。Lavalink每5秒会发PlayerUpdate事件给Audio，Audio通过Redis转发给Gateway，Gateway按需更新UI。另外歌曲结束后的队列管理也很重要。
我画了一个loop块表示每5秒的状态同步。然后TrackEnd事件触发后：Audio从PostgreSQL删除已播放的歌曲，重新索引队列position，再查是否有下一首。这里又有分支对吧？
是的，三个分支：队列还有歌就继续播放下一首；队列为空但开了autoplay就生成推荐歌曲；队列为空且没开autoplay就销毁player并更新UI显示队列结束。
autoplay的推荐逻辑是Audio服务内部自己算的吗？需要调外部API吗？
目前设计是内部基于最后播放的歌曲风格本地计算，不画外部调用。所以时序上就是Audio自己跟自己交互：Get similar tracks based on last played，然后add to queue and play。
完成了三个结束分支的绘制。销毁player的分支里，Audio调Lavalink DELETE接口，然后发Redis消息给Gateway，Gateway PATCH消息显示"Queue finished"。整个流程到这就闭环了。
我检查一下，发现Lavalink发opus packets给Discord之后，到TrackEnd事件之前，中间缺少持续的音频流传输表示。虽然Lavalink内部持续拉流，但时序图上最好明确YouTube到Lavalink的流是持续的。
你说得对，我在Lavalink-YouTube之间补充了双向箭头和Note："Stream audio data"和"Download and encode audio"，明确表示这是持续的数据流直到歌曲结束。同时给Discord-User的opus packets也加了持续传输的暗示。
另外Gateway在最开始回callback的时候，我注意到用的是POST /interactions/{id}/callback，这里的id应该是interaction ID。为了和后面的webhook消息删除对应，需要确保Gateway保存了interaction token。
已在Gateway的Note里补充：Validate interaction, Check permissions, Save interaction token for later deletion。这样和最后DELETE /webhooks/{application_id}/messages/@original形成呼应。
整体结构很完整了。最后确认一下autonumber要开启，让步骤清晰可读。还有开头的全局Note说明场景：User wants to play a song in voice channel，结尾对应Note：User hears music playing in voice channel。
elements_involved: User wants to play a song

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 已添加autonumber，首尾Note也已就位。整个时序图从用户输入命令开始，经过Gateway分发、Audio服务处理、Lavalink播放，到队列管理和结束处理，完整闭环。总计约35个交互步骤，分支逻辑清晰。
